'''Esports XO Pro Cup''' is a tournament organised by '''Esports XO''' for the teams of {{Flag|in}} India with a total prize pool of ₹15,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}}.

==About==
===Broadcast talent===
{{broadcasterCard
|position=Casters|lang=Hindi
|b1=RA1
|b2=SardarjiYT
}}

===Format===
* '''League Stage:'''  ''June 20th - 23th, 2023
** 24 teams:
*** {{Bgcolortext|stayup|22 teams}} invited
*** {{Bgcolortext|stayup|2 teams}} from Open Cup
** Teams are divided equally into 3 groups of 8.
** Round-robin format.
** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 16}} teams qualify for ''finals.
<div style="margin-top:12px"/>
* '''Finals:''''' June 24th - 26th, 2023
** 16 teams.
** ?? matches.

==Prize Pool==
''To be determined
